title: Extension WebSocket client + key exchange
description: Implement the WebSocket connection flow in background.ts: connect to wss://<host>/cowork, send auth token, perform X25519 key exchange (send public key, receive daemon's, derive session key, send encrypted hello, verify hello-ack). Store session state in chrome.storage.session for popup recovery.
acceptanceCriteria: connect(host, token) opens WebSocket to wss://<host>/cowork
Sends { type: 'auth', token } as first message
On auth success, sends { type: 'key-exchange', publicKey } with ephemeral X25519 public key
Derives session key using PSK from chrome.storage.local
Receives and decrypts hello-ack — session now encrypted
Session state (connected, host, encryption status) saved to chrome.storage.session
Auth failure (4000) surfaces error to popup
Key exchange failure (4001/4002) surfaces error to popup
disconnect() cleanly closes WebSocket and clears session state
